title: stelis hydra
intro: Stelis hydra, also known as the Butterfly Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis hydra include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource in the treatment of various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Stelis hydra often involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's roots and stems, which are used to create remedies for various ailments.
